summary:
**Needle found and fixed!** The bug was a port mismatch in the nginx config: `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default` was proxying `/api/` to `http://127.0.0.1:5001`, but the Flask app in `app/server.py` listens on port 5000. (The `/health` endpoint bypassed the proxy, so Test 1 always passed.)

I updated the `proxy_pass` line to use the correct port. Running `./test.sh` now confirms **ALL TESTS PASSED** (exit code 0).
